findings.title: phani-x507/-Offline-LLMs-for-Low-Spec-Devices--A-Study-on-Efficiency-and-Usability-
findings.description: This project benchmarks offline Masked and Causal Language Models (MLMs, CLMs) like DistilBERT, MobileBERT, TinyLLaMA, Phi-2, and Gemma-2B. It evaluates accuracy, efficiency, and text quality using BLEU, ROUGE, and Perplexity, ensuring privacy-focused AI applications. The results guide optimal offline LLM selection.
